title: Dataset for: The Power of Small Steps: Daily Goal Progress and Psychological Well-Being
author: Hefer, Moran
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This upload contains the dataset collected for the research project titled: The Power of Small Steps: Daily Goal Progress and Psychological Well-Being. The files include longitudinal quantitative data from a daily diary study, as well as qualitative research data. All participant data has been fully anonymized.
steps_raw: This upload contains the dataset collected for the research project titled: The Power of Small Steps: Daily Goal Progress and Psychological Well-Being. The files include longitudinal quantitative data from a daily diary study, as well as qualitative research data. All participant data has been fully anonymized.
